sections.heading: Clinical Note
sections.section_value:
Chief Complaint
Chest pain
History of Present Illness
The patient reports experiencing chest pain, describing it as a burning sensation. He states the chest pain is not severe. He also reports nasal congestion and shortness of breath over the past month. The patient has a history of coronary artery disease and reports feeling a burning sensation in his chest.
Findings
Examination reveals nasal congestion. No other physical exam findings were noted.
Assessment
The patient has known coronary artery disease.
Plan
The doctor ordered a physical exam. A lipid panel will be ordered. The patient will start crestor 20 mg once a day. The patient will continue on aspirin. The patient will continue on toprol.
